title: Dealing with temporary tables
poc: create table tmp(int i, int j);
insert into tmp select * from tapestry;
key_bug_features: Temporary table deletion after data insertion
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tmp(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO tmp(id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test'), (2, NULL), (3, 'Boundary');
CREATE TABLE tapestry(id INT, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO tapestry SELECT id, name FROM tmp WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL;
